---
name: Security report
about: Report a security vulnerability
labels: security
---

## ⚠️ STOP

**Do not file security reports as public issues.**

Please use one of these private channels instead:

1. **GitHub Security Advisory** — preferred
   <https://github.com/avifenesh/cairn-rs/security/advisories/new>

2. **Email** — avifenesh@users.noreply.github.com

See [`SECURITY.md`](../../SECURITY.md) for the full policy, scope,
and disclosure timelines.

---

If this issue is not a security report, please use a different template
(Bug report or Feature request).
